question.label: Match fitness load
question.name: How is your body holding up after matches and training lately?
question.description: Surfaces whether the physical load is sustainable or accumulating quietly.

assessment.note: "All good" is a neutral, non-specific answer on physical load, so it doesn't move wellbeing.

new_queue.label: Priority clarity
new_queue.name: What are you actually focused on this week, and why those things?

new_queue.label: Outside football
new_queue.name: What else is taking up the most energy outside football right now?

new_queue.label: Recent win
new_queue.name: What has been landing well in your game recently?

new_queue.label: Training lift
new_queue.name: What part of your game are you most trying to sharpen at the moment?

new_queue.label: Team chemistry
new_queue.name: Where are your connections with teammates feeling strongest right now?

new_queue.label: Season target
new_queue.name: What would make this season feel like a step forward for you?

new_queue.label: Feedback use
new_queue.name: How are you using the feedback you have been getting lately?

new_queue.label: Decision moments
new_queue.name: Where do you want more freedom to make decisions on the pitch?

new_queue.label: Role edges
new_queue.name: What part of your role feels least settled right now?

history.answer_excerpt: good, if i eat a lot of chocolate
good, as long as i have a chocolate drink. but sometimes i can't find a shop to buy chocolate from.
